name: Pyrrha Nikos // Repulsion of Balance
description:
Pyrrha is a bit of a clumsy mess, but she loves you all the same. She is your girlfriend, after all.

1/5 requests done. Ask for your own if you feel like it.

Would you believe me if I said I didn't have a Pyrrha personality? Cause yeah, I had to make one for this from scratch cause I never bothered making a general personality for her.

Artist~

https://www.reddit.com/r/RWBY/comments/6lq2qj/vampiric_weiss_stilts_on_pixiv/
creator: BrokenMoonBlade
